heading: Today
text: Periods of morning clouds, giving way to sun, then mixing with afternoon clouds.  Highs in the 50s, ranging from 50 to 60 north to south.  Winds becoming west to northwest near 10 mph, a few gusts to 25 mph over the higher terrain and NH.

heading: Tonight
text: Clearing, with a few clouds, mainly north.  Lows in the 30s to near 40, a few cold spots near 32 with patchy frost.  Winds west near 10 mph, diminishing to light and variable in wind-sheltered valleys.

heading: Friday
text: Morning sun mixing with clouds midday and afternoon.  A chance of an isolated shower or sprinkle, mostly over the higher elevations.  Remaining cool.  Highs in the 50s, closer to 50 far north.  Winds west near 10 mph.
